project: Tiny Ralph Agent - 自动化测试与修复

tasks.title: 测试 infrastructure/task_state.py
tasks.description: 验证 TaskState 类可以正常创建、加载、更新任务状态
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.task_state import TaskState; ts = TaskState('./runtime'); tid = ts.create_task('test'); state = ts.load_task(tid); assert state is not None; print(f'OK: {tid}'); import shutil; shutil.rmtree('./runtime', ignore_errors=True)"

tasks.title: 测试 infrastructure/tool_verifier.py
tasks.description: 验证 ToolVerifier 类可以正常初始化和验证工具
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.tool_verifier import ToolVerifier; tv = ToolVerifier('./tools/custom'); print('OK' if tv else 'FAIL'); import shutil; shutil.rmtree('./tools/custom', ignore_errors=True)"

tasks.title: 测试 middleware/decision_small.py 导入
tasks.description: 验证 DecisionMiddleware 小模型版可以正常导入
tasks.verification: python -c "from middleware.decision_small import DecisionMiddleware; dm = DecisionMiddleware(); print('OK')"

tasks.title: 测试 middleware/execution_small.py 导入
tasks.description: 验证 ExecutionMiddleware 小模型版可以正常导入（需要tool_verifier参数）
tasks.verification: python -c "from middleware.execution_small import ExecutionMiddleware; from infrastructure.tool_verifier import ToolVerifier; tv = ToolVerifier('./tools/custom'); em = ExecutionMiddleware(tool_verifier=tv); print('OK'); import shutil; shutil.rmtree('./tools/custom', ignore_errors=True)"

tasks.title: 测试 middleware/feedback_small.py 导入
tasks.description: 验证 FeedbackMiddleware 小模型版可以正常导入
tasks.verification: python -c "from middleware.feedback_small import FeedbackMiddleware; fm = FeedbackMiddleware(); print('OK')"

tasks.title: 测试 agent/ralph_loop.py 导入
tasks.description: 验证 RalphLoop 类可以正常导入
tasks.verification: python -c "from agent.ralph_loop import RalphLoop; rl = RalphLoop(); print('OK')"

tasks.title: 测试 agent/graph.py 中的 build_ralph_graph
tasks.description: 验证 build_ralph_graph 函数可以正常导入

tasks.title: 测试 infrastructure/skill_library.py 导入
tasks.description: 验证 SkillLibrary 类可以正常导入和初始化
tasks.verification: python -c "from infrastructure.skill_library import SkillLibrary; sl = SkillLibrary('./skills/library'); print('OK')"

tasks.title: 测试 RalphLoop.create_and_run 方法
tasks.description: 验证 RalphLoop 可以创建任务并执行（使用模拟LLM）
tasks.verification: python -c "from agent.ralph_loop import RalphLoop; rl = RalphLoop(); result = rl.create_and_run('test task'); print(f'OK: success={result.get(\"success\")}'); import shutil; shutil.rmtree('./runtime', ignore_errors=True); shutil.rmtree('./tools/custom', ignore_errors=True)"

tasks.title: 测试完整导入链
tasks.description: 验证所有核心模块可以一起导入
tasks.verification: python -c "from agent.ralph_loop import RalphLoop; from middleware.decision_small import DecisionMiddleware; from middleware.execution_small import ExecutionMiddleware; from middleware.feedback_small import FeedbackMiddleware; from infrastructure.task_state import TaskState; from infrastructure.tool_verifier import ToolVerifier; from infrastructure.skill_library import SkillLibrary; from agent.graph import build_ralph_graph; print('OK - All modules imported successfully')"
